subject: feat(content): multi-block freeform text with per-block styling and reordering
body:
Freeform mode now supports multiple independently styled markdown blocks per cell.
Each block has its own color, size, bold, italic, letter spacing, alignment,
spacer/line separator controls, and can be moved up/down or deleted.

- textDefaults: added defaultFreeformBlock shape and createFreeformBlock factory
- useAdState: replaced setFreeformText with addFreeformBlock, updateFreeformBlock,
  removeFreeformBlock, moveFreeformBlock (array-of-blocks per cell)
- ContentTab: new FreeformBlockEditor component with move/delete/style controls,
  FreeformCellEditor renders block list with "Add Text Block" button
- AdCanvas: renderFreeformTextForCell iterates block array with per-block styling
  and spacer/line decorations
- App.jsx: wires new block CRUD props to ContentTab

Tags: text, freeform, content, canvas, state
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: neutral
Epic: freeform-text
Semver: minor
